title: Mr. Thyme's Advanced Advancements
description: Aims to expand upon the vanilla advancement feature and expand it into areas left without attention.
body: Mr. Thyme's Advanced Advancements is a datapack that adds advancements in a vanilla style. These advancements are meant to enhance the experience of the vanilla game, and both fill in areas of the game left advancementless (ocean monuments, ancient cities, etc) as well as make progression of lesser known mechanics visible in an in game format (redstone, niche mob mechanics, rare but useful blocks and items). It also adds a few challenges to add more to the endgame of minecraft.
